title: Just Around The Block
description: Whether you want a cozy backyard or nail-biting adventure, it's Just Around The Block!
body:
Whether you're looking to explore the varied environment with Regions Unexplored, spice up your cullinary skills with Farmer's Delight, take to the skys (Northstar: Redux), the experience you desire is Just Around The Block! I own none of the mods in this pack, if you have any suggestions or bugs found, feel free to reach out at parrishpotato@zohomail.com! If you feel like experiencing this modpack with friends, check the version notes to know which mods to omit from the server instance, as some of the client side mods cause the server to crash. I will update that list each time this modpack is updated. Recommend allocating at least 6gb of RAM Modlist:
